title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBSXTsq5nD, SXTsq Lite5, L3
description: The SXTsq Lite5 is a compact and lightweight outdoor wireless device with an integrated antenna. Perfect for point to point links of up to 12 kilometers or as a CPE unit. It is compact, weatherproof and easy to mount. The SXTsq Lite5 retains a 16dBi antenna like the SXT Lite5, our previous model, yet the antenna design has been improved and the physical size has been dramatically reduced - the SXTsq is two times thinner The enclosure includes slots for directly attaching a metallic ring mount in three different mounting places, with ability to be mounted on horizontal railings. The device includes one 10/100Mbit ethernet port . There is also an easily accessilble grounding connection to protect it against lightning Device PoE injector Power adapter 24V/0.38A Metal ring
